creator: gahr@gahr.ch
text:
It's been reported that the shar archive doesn't extract properly.
Here is a tbz2 tarball of the linux-netscape-navigator port:

http://www.gahr.ch/FreeBSD/patches/117266_linux-netscape-navigator.tbz2

SHA256 (117266_linux-netscape-navigator.tbz2) =
4daa18e1762da4b166c222402cbae4c91b691963c3cf5afed1770a65c339ad57

Thanks,

-- 
Pietro Cerutti
